channel.title: raflines
channel.description: Best RSS Feed in South America

item.title: DISCO 2000 Prototype
item.description:
Hey bros! Today I decided to release a prototype I was making last year for a little game project called DISCO 2000. You can play it here on Itch.io! I wrote a little bit about the game on the Itch.io page so go take a look there if you want to know more.

In other news, my next project 'FLINESWARE 2026' will be released soon, in April, and will feature all the projects I have worked on that are currently released such as ELEMENTAL CROSSING, OUT OF THE LOOP, the FLIN games but excluding games that are not currently published such as COUNTRY MAKER and SWAP if you know those. DISCO 2000 will not be featured either. FLINESWARE 2026 will come with a lot of cool bonus contents for a lot of projects so please check it out when it's out! I will leave you with some cool behind the scenes screenshots for DISCO 2000 to compensate for the fact it's not on FLINESWARE and I won't be able to show these in there.

item.title: ELEMENTAL CROSSING Version 1.4
item.description:
Hi bros! I just released version 1.4 of ELEMENTAL CROSSING on armorgames! This is kind of a big update that changes how the game works with the addition of element collections and lets you play challenges before having to complete ALL the levels. You can check out the patch noteshere in the ArmorGames page.

Someone who helped me a lot with this version was little Maya (she has a button in my site) and she was the one who figured out the collections stuff, so thats like uh. Pretty awesome. This version isn't available on Newgrounds and Itch.io yet but when it's out I will let you know. Cheers!

In other epic news, the first episode of STEEL BALL RUN just released which is also uh. Pretty awesome. and I might make a post about it some other time. Most importantly, today is Kat's birthday! go check out her neocities here!!!!

item.title: ELEMENTAL CROSSING is now live on ARMORGAMES!
item.description: Hi bros. ELEMENTAL CROSSING IS NOW LIVE ON ARMORGAMES!!!!!!!! YIIPPPIIIIEEEEEE! GO CHECK IT OUT, NOW!

item.title: NEW RENDERS!
item.description: Hi bros. Just updated my site to include some COOL NEW RENDERS. I also updated some of my social media to use a new FLINES render as the profile picture, enjoy! I might use him more now...

item.title: FISHIN' OUT
item.description:
Fish Game is finally fish out. Please play it now.
This is a game I made with my dear friend Faraway, whose post must be above mine, in a 3-day game jam. I asked my girlfriend to give us 2 themes and she gave us Bottom of the Sea and Stars. That is how we came up with Fish Game. That is all. I forgot to put Lil Bayes in the game so please leave me alone now.

The hero of our story is named Johnson Jonshon and you better get it right. The world is ending and all he wants is to catch stars.

item.title: ELEMENTAL CROSSING Version 1.3
item.description: Version 1.3 for ELEMENTAL CROSSING is now out! Check out patch notes here! This is mostly likely the last update of the game, fixes some bugs and makes the overall experience better. This update also adds MEDALS to the NEWGROUNDS version of the game, GO PLAY IT!!! IT'S LIKE CHRISTMAS OVER THERE!!!

item.title: ELEMENTAL CROSSING Version 1.2
item.description: A new update for Elemental Crossing has just been released, you can check the patch notes here! There might be a patch for this update coming out soon just to tie everything together but I believe the game is all done!

item.title: ELEMENTAL CROSSING Version 1.1
item.description: A major bug fix update has just been released for Elemental Crossing! Check it out here!

item.title: ELEMENTAL CROSSING is OUT!
item.description: My new game, ELEMENTAL CROSSING, is out! Go check it out over at Itch.io or Newgrounds! Elemental Crossing is a timewaster game where all you need to do is connect elements, so easy! so peasy! Please play it.

item.title: Introducing: RAFLINES RSS FEED™
item.description:
I decided to implement my own RSS Feed on my site so I can automatically make blog posts! I am not sure how often I will post here but please enjoy.

(RAFLINES RSS FEED IS NOT ACTUALLY TRADEMARKED OR OWNED BY RAFLINES.)
